headline: Tyler Technologies, Inc. Announces Closing of Upsized Offering of $1,437,500,000 of 0.50% Convertible Senior Notes due 2031
summary: PLANO, Texas, May 14, 2026--Tyler Technologies, Inc. announces closing of upsized offering of $1,437,500,000 of 0.50% convertible senior notes due 2031.
